chunks.text: Facilities and Engineering Services Staff at EECS, Berkeley. Cory & Soda Hall contacts include forms for card key/key requests, building maintenance, and room reservations. Email addresses for keys, visitor info, building questions, instructional labs, and printer issues are provided. Use the Building Project/Repair Request Form to report problems in Cory or Soda Hall.

Facilities staff includes Logan Baldini as Director of Facilities & Capital Projects, located at 253 Cory Hall with contact info. Building Managers: Cory Hall position is open, handling building problems; Soda Hall managed by Chris Delligatti, handling office assignments and maintenance. Development Technician position is open for electrical work and lab support. Computer Workstation Evaluators include Logan Baldini.

Main Office Coordinators include Katie Ravnik as Facilities Admin Coordinator and Karla Thao as Copy Card Assistant for Cory and Soda Halls, handling copy card issues. Event information covers the EECS Event Calendar, event submission, planning calendar, and room reservations for department events in Cory and Soda Halls.

Engineering Services Group (ESG) website is referenced. Manager is Katherina Law, located at 380 Cory with contact info. AV/IT Engineer/Senior Producer is James Eldredge, responsible for video capture and AV support. Research & Development Engineering Team includes David Au, Ming Wong, and Xiaoman Wu, focusing on instructional lab and AV support.
